Errors, Flaws, or Mistakes in Logic or Reasoning:**\n- The code appears correct and idiomatic for Pulumi SDK usage.\n- Input validation is minimal but typical for generated SDK code.\n- The utility function `utilities.getVersion()` is called to set a version parameter; unless this function is malicious (which is unlikely), this pattern is standard.\n- No logical flaws or security issues are identified.\n\n**3.
